label: Now Developing
items: Sara Duterte’s second impeachment cleared the House justice panel with 215+ votes confirmed — the plenary vote on May 11 made her the first Philippine official impeached twice.
Marcos chaired the 48th ASEAN Summit in Cebu, adopted the
framework, and secured a 1.5M-metric-ton rice deal with Vietnam.
Mayon Volcano hit 102,000 affected residents at Alert Level 3 as Q1 GDP came in at a 5-year-low 2.8% — oil shock and corruption fallout squeezing the economy.
